final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input T,
    output reg Q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q;
        end
    end
endmodule
